basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) has officially announced the Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official IIM Kozhikode website. Candidates who meet the maximum age limit of 35 years and hold an M.A. in Cultural Studies, Media Studies, Geography, Anthropology, or Environmental Studies can now submit their online applications up to 21-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.A. in Cultural Studies/ Media Studies/ Geography/ Anthropology/ Environmental Studies
qualification.details: M. A in Cultural Studies/ Media Studies/ Geography/ Anthropology Environmental Studies from a recognized university/ institution with strong written and oral communication skills in English.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIM Kozhikode Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant Age Limit 2026
IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Assistant position at IIM Kozhikode?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Research Assistant position at IIM Kozhikode is 21st July 2026. Ensure you complete and submit your application before this deadline to be considered.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.A. degree in Cultural Studies, Media Studies, Geography, Anthropology, or Environmental Studies from a recognized university or institution. Strong English communication skills are also essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Research Assistant position is 35 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Assistant post at the Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for the Research Assistant position is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of IIM Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant position will involve a Skill Test followed by an Interview. Candidates must perform well in both stages to be considered for the role.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Research Assistant position at IIM Kozhikode is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIM Kozhikode located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode is located in Kozhikode, Kerala, with the pincode 673570.
